name: D-Day Invasions
detailed_description:
Fight in online multiplayer battles with up to 64 players in this sequel to Honor & Duty: D-Day. This game features visual enhancements, new maps, map reworks, brand new features and more. Play in PVP matches or against bots with up to 3 other players for PVE action.

There are five classes with a progression system allowing you to enhance each class with special abilities and perks. Weapons can be customized with a variety of attachments including scopes, grips, bayonets, weapon skins and more.

Online gameplay features epic matches with up to 64 players in multiple game modes including favorites such as Team Deathmatch, Attack & Defend and Free For All. Battle on foot, jump in a tank or speed into action in a jeep, it's your choice!

The core mechanics have been reworked to be more intuitive along with major HUD & UI overhauls which make the game more immersive. VR interactions have been significantly improved to allow for manual reloading of weapons.
